title: DeckCraft (Minecraft on Steam Deck)
description: Do you want to play Minecraft on your steam deck? You want an optimization modpack that is lightweight and performant. Then don't wait, download DeckCraft!
body:
# DeckCraft (or Minecraft on SteamDeck)

You own a **SteamDeck**, or any other Handheld?
You want to play **Minecraft**? _(obviously yes)_ but...

Sadly, there's **no** native **way to play with all the controls** and customisations required to be able to play on the handheld.

## **NOW YOU CAN!**

With **DeckCraft**, you can play Minecraft on your **Steam Deck**, **Controller**, **ROG ALLY**, without any issues. 

## Controller Support

Thanks to [MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols), now you can play with controllers, especially on the **Steam Deck**. 

## Optimization and More FPS!

Better Rendering: [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) rewrites Minecraft's **OpenGL** renderer to **Vulkan**.

Better Multithreading: [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric), Minecraft now takes advantage of the multiple cores and threads of a CPU to do tasks **faster** and **in parrallel**.

Better Memory Management: [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) **reduces the memory usage** and thus allows to run Minecraft on more systems and with more mods.

Better Light Calculation: [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux) is the continuation of [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) and makes the lighting calculation **way faster** and **in parrallel**.

## Quality of Life (QOL)
Thanks to [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload), you can change languages without waiting ages. **It prevents unecessary loadings**.
